channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Davante Adams makes surprise guest TV appearance alongside Aaron Rodgers hours after trade to Jets
item.description: Former Packers stars Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers will reunite, but this time they will both be wearing a different shade of green following a reported blockbuster trade.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kucherov gets 4th goal of the season, Lightning beat Canucks 4-1 in Milton-delayed home opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored his fourth goal of the season, and the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Vancouver Canucks in their hurricane-delayed home opener on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell says the league still reviewing latest claims against Deshaun Watson
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell said the league is still reviewing the latest claims of sexual assault and battery against Deshaun Watson.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL owners approve Jacksonville's $1.4 billion 'stadium of the future' set to open in 2028
item.description: NFL owners unanimously approved Jacksonville's $1.4 billion “stadium of the future” Tuesday, a decision that should keep the Jaguars in one of the league's smallest markets for at least another 30 years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mbappé's representatives dismiss Swedish reports of a rape claim
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — French soccer star Kylian Mbappé’s representatives have rejected as “false and irresponsible” reports in Swedish media saying he is the subject of a rape investigation in the Nordic country.
item.dc:creator: KARL RITTER and SAMUEL PETREQUIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bears vs Commanders flexed to later time slot: NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears Week 8 game at the Washington Commanders has been flexed to the late afternoon window, according to a press release from the NFL League Office. The NFL announced Tuesday the Bears’ Week 8 road matchup against the Commanders has been flexed to 3:25 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: Pitcher Alex Cobb has been dropped from the Cleveland Guardians AL Championship Series roster after getting hurt in the opener and has been replaced by fellow right-hander Ben Lively, the team’s winningest pitcher during the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ex-Sharks coach happy to see Tank full again: ‘It’s such a great hockey market’
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks, who play the Dallas Stars on Tuesday, enjoyed some renewed fan support at SAP Center last week
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Pro soccer club with player who refused to sign gay pride shirt says he is staying with the team
item.description: VfL Wolfsburg player Kevin Behrens is still with the team and training with his teammates despite an incident where he refused to sign a gay pride shirt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: The Buffalo Bills upgraded their patchwork group of receivers by acquiring Amari Cooper in a trade with the Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A California surf gang has harassed outsiders for decades. Can anything stop them?
item.description: A group known as the Bay Boys has sought to rule the waves, slashing the tires of nonlocals, pelting rocks at surfers descending a cliffside trail and physically harassing anyone brave enough to paddle out.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Too many men: No. 2 Oregon purposely induced late penalty in win over No. 4 Ohio State
item.description: EUGENE, Ore. (AP) — No. 2 Oregon had 12 men on the field late in its 32-31 win over No. 4 Ohio State, with the resulting penalty causing precious seconds to wind off the clock. Turns out, it was on purpose.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caleb Williams and the Bears are looking good at their bye with 3 straight wins and a 4-2 mark
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Caleb Williams is settling into a rhythm, and the Bears are racking up wins. Overall, things are looking good for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bill Belichick torches Jets ownership over decision to fire Robert Saleh after 5 games
item.description: Former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick torched the New York Jets for the decision to fire Robert Saleh five games into the 2024 seaosn.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees strike first with Game 1 win over Guardians in ALCS
item.description: Juan Soto and Giancarlo Stanton went deep and Carlos Rodon set the tone on the mound, as the New York Yankees beat the Cleveland Guardians in Game 1 of the ALCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Clayton Kershaw planning to pitch again next season
item.description: Clayton Kershaw says he plans to return to the Los Angeles Dodgers for his 18th season next year. The three-time NL Cy Young Award winner isn’t pitching in the current playoffs because of a bone spur in his left big toe that sidelined him for the final month of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Ricky Pearsall returns to the 49ers practice for the first time since shooting
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall returned to the field for practice on Monday for the first time since he was shot in the chest during an attempted robbery nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Pro rider Cam Zink breaks ribs in hard fall during Red Bull Rampage mountain biking competition
item.description: Pro mountain biker Cameron Zink suffered six broken ribs and a punctured lung after a hard crash at Red Bull Rampage -- a particularly challenging freeride competition -- in southern Utah on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Jerry West becomes first three-time inductee as Carter and Billups enter basketball's Hall of Fame
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Mass. (AP) — The stage was filled with Laker greats when Jerry West made history Sunday night by becoming the first three-time inductee to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Matt McCarty wins first PGA event at Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) - IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Winners of the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon
item.description: Runners from across the world gathered in Chicago Sunday for the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Former LSU pole vaulter Mondo Duplantis proposes to girlfriend during Vogue photo shoot
item.description: Duplantis got down on one knee and proposed to Desiré Inglander while taking photos in The Hamptons. According to Vogue Scandinavia, the couple has been together for four years.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Velazquez, NewsNation

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Nearly 50,000 participate in 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon; downtown street closures in place
item.description: The Chicago Marathon will take place on Sunday, October 13, with thousands of runners and spectators expected to attend, and several downtown streets closures already in place.
item.dc:creator: Anna Roberts, WGN 9

item.title: Fruita's Olivia Wirth gets family support on senior night
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Growing up the youngest of three in a competitive, athletic household, Fruita Monument senior Olivia Wirth learned the value of hard work from her parents and siblings.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
